description: Migrate the monitoring stack (Prometheus, Grafana, and Node Exporter) from the legacy shell script at '/home/ga/monitoring-stack/run_commands.sh' to a Docker Compose deployment. Create a '/home/ga/monitoring-stack/docker-compose.yml' file that faithfully translates all original configurations, including networks, ports, volumes, environment variables, restart policies, and bind mounts. Ensure the stack is running and all services are accessible on ports 9090, 3000, and 9100.
